images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful, young, sexy Japanese female model, echoing a top‑tier gravure idol, standing in a snow‑draped forest with straight black silky hair catching soft light. She sports an oversized varsity jacket in pastel tones over a form‑fitting cropped tee that highlights her curvy silhouette and ample chest. Laughing naturally, she clutches a small vintage book, eyes sparkling and grin infectious. Shot at eye level with a Sony A7R IV and 85 mm f/1.4 GM lens, it features shallow depth of field, global illumination, and ray‑traced lighting for cinematic realism. Her confident, sporty posture and expressive eyes give an energetic, viral vibe.8k photo, Large breasts
